series_metadata.series_title: Investment Compliance Reporting Database for State Accounts
series_metadata.series_description: Information from the Investment Compliance Reporting Worksheets (SEC-223) is entered into this electronic database. These worksheets are completed each week for each investment account and document compliance with relevant investment policies.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Electronic: Delete
